name: mdx-tsc-vscode
description: Type-checking for MDX: frontmatter schemas, provided components, and type errors — powered by the mdx-tsc language server.
author: Andrew Lisowski

markdownEnumDescriptions: Provide hover, go-to-definition, and completion **only** for schema-typed `frontmatter` (and member chains rooted at it) — the feature the official MDX extension can't offer — and stay silent elsewhere, so nothing is duplicated. Diagnostics are always on.
Provide the **full** TypeScript service (hover/definition/completion everywhere). Surfaces typed `frontmatter`, but **duplicates** hovers and completions the official MDX extension also provides.
Contribute **only diagnostics** (squiggles); leave all hover/definition/completion to the official MDX extension.
mdx-tsc.languageFeatures.markdownDescription:
How much of the TypeScript language service mdx-tsc contributes on top of the official MDX extension. mdx-tsc's unique value is schema-typed `frontmatter`, which the official extension can't provide; beyond that its hover/completion merely duplicate the official plugin.

- `scoped` (default) — hover/completion/definition only for `frontmatter`; no duplication.
- `full` — the whole TS service; duplicates the official plugin's hovers/completions.
- `off` — diagnostics only (fully additive).

Requires reloading the window.
mdx-tsc.languageFeatures.description: How much of the TypeScript language service mdx-tsc contributes: 'scoped' (frontmatter only, default), 'full' (everything, duplicates the official MDX extension), or 'off' (diagnostics only). Requires reloading the window.

mdx-tsc.trace.server.description: Trace the communication between VS Code and the mdx-tsc language server.
